content.en:
The Holy Gift—the Son of the Poisonous Wind!

The Holy Gifter - Shadow Moon Son!

The Holy Gift—the Son of the Bones!

The reputation of these three Holy Sons in the Dark Destruction Domain is incomparably great, and they have even killed many domain ancestors, and they have also destroyed a small realm.

They are almost the embodiment of death, the kings of destruction!

Everyone fears these three holy sons, and if they are angered, they will surely die.

"Where's the ancestral medicine?"

Seeing that this ancestral medicine realm was slowly dissipating, the Poison Wind Holy Son knew that the ancestral medicine had been taken away, so he asked.

"It was taken by a saint-endowed person in the Dark Sanctuary, and the Holy Son of Desolation was also killed by that man!"

An evil genius hurriedly said.

"That guy was killed?"

The Three Holy Sons were a little surprised.

Although they couldn't see the guy who was desolate, the talent of the desolation was indeed very good, although it was not as good as their Holy Endowment.

But they also knew very well that they were only using the Holy Endowment and Holy Technique, and if the Annihilation could be promoted to the Supreme Domain Ancestor level in the future, it would not be weaker than them.

But now, the Holy Son of Desolation has been killed by outsiders.

This has to be said to be a loss for the Dark Destruction Domain.

Of course, they didn't really care, but they wanted to kill the alien saint.

"It's not easy for the Holy Giver of the Dark Sanctuary to be able to kill Annihilation quickly, the three of us are not necessarily opponents, we must join forces to be sure to deal with him!" the Poison Wind Saint Son began.

"Hmm!"

The Shadow Moon Saint Son and the Bone Absolute Saint Son nodded.

They didn't dare to hold it up, after all, they also learned from the mouths of these evil clan geniuses and the geniuses of the Destruction Saint Clan that the geniuses of the Dark Sacred Domain had killed the Holy Son of Annihilation in two moves.

Two moves to kill the Holy Son of Annihilation, the three of them could not bear it.

Unless it is the Holy Son of Annihilation who does not wear a defensive domain weapon and a secret treasure, it is impossible to kill the Holy Son of Annihilation in two moves.

This was enough to prove that the strength of that Saint Endowment was very strong, and they judged that the Holy Endowment Saint Body was very powerful, and they had also cultivated an offensive powerful Saint Technique to the perfection realm, so they had such strength.

In the face of such a holy endowment, if they encounter it alone, they can't beat it at all, even if they can save their lives with the help of the holy relics defense on their bodies, they can't beat each other.

If the three of them join forces, and then use the holy relics, they may be able to defeat each other or even kill each other.

However, they still underestimated Ye Tian's strength.

......

Ye Tian was not prepared to kill one or two Saint Endowments, and when the difference in strength was not very exaggerated, it was more difficult to kill a Saint Endowment.

Don't look at the fact that he defeated the Light-clothed Saintess in the Battle Realm Tower, if he fought with ordinary Saint Grants, he could easily defeat them, but that was in the Battle Realm Tower.

In the War Tower, once the physical body is destroyed to a certain extent, it can no longer heal, and it is judged to be a failure.

But in the outside world, the ability of the Holy Endowment to save life is very strong, where is it so easy to be killed?

Moreover, they also have domain weapons, secret treasures, and even holy relics, so it is even more difficult to kill them!

Once Ye Tian is unable to kill a Saint Grant in a short period of time, he will face a siege against the Saint Endowment.

Once many saints urge the holy relics, he may not be able to resist them, unless he also uses a holy object like the forbidden yuan blade.

But in that case, the replica body may not last long.

Therefore, it is not worth it.

The Holy Endowment is not in a hurry to kill, first collect some more holy medicines and even ancestral medicines, and it is not bad to kill more ordinary geniuses.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian collected a lot of holy medicines, and also killed a lot of geniuses of the Destruction Saint Clan and the Evil Clan, and was also found by those Saint Grants many times, but his speed was much faster than these Saint Grants, and he easily got rid of them and did not fight with them.

In the blink of an eye, half a month has passed.

Almost all the holy medicines bred in the treasure land of the Holy Medicine Garden were picked, and many of the geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain left one by one and went to other places.

Of course, there is another reason, it is too threatening here, once you meet Ye Tian, you will not be able to live.

And the Holy Endowment had not been able to catch Ye Tian, which made them even more frightened, so they left early.

"Three ancestral medicines, 100,000 holy medicines, and millions of semi-holy medicines, this time the harvest is very good!"

Ye Tian sorted out the harvest and muttered.

He wasn't going to stay here anymore, and was going to go to the Golden Ancestor Monument.

That's where he's really headed!

--------------------

"It's here!"

Ye Tian came to the Ancestor Holy Mountain where the Golden Ancestor Monument was located.

The Golden Ancestor Monument is on the Ancestral Sacred Mountain, but if you want to enter the Ancestral Sacred Mountain, you must pass through the checkpoints.

And the level is divided into three levels.

The first level is strength, if the strength is not good, you are not qualified to go through the second and third levels, and you will lose your qualifications directly.

The second level is potential, and if the potential is low, there is no need to participate in the third level assessment.

The third level is comprehension, and if it is low, it will also be eliminated.

Because of these three levels, the geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain have come here, and at most only one in a thousand geniuses can pass the three levels to comprehend the Golden Ancestor Tablet.

After all, the Dark Destruction Domain doesn't look at comprehension very much, and the whole is still dominated by bloodline races.

For example, the Destruction Saint Clan is born above the Three Thousand Evil Clans, and any Destruction Saint Clan is far superior to the Three Thousand Evil Clans, and only the geniuses among the Three Thousand Evil Clans are qualified to compare with the Destruction Saint Clan.

Ye Tian's arrival naturally attracted the attention of the geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain.

But before they could besiege Ye Tian, Ye Tian entered the Ancestor Holy Mountain and participated in the three-level assessment.

The Ancestral Sacred Mountain.

Ye Tianyi stepped into this place and came to a void.

Soon, a force condensed into a black figure, and the aura was very powerful.

Judging from the breath, it should belong to the Perfection of the One Realm, but the breath is extremely pure and powerful, and the strength is afraid that it has the combat power of an early stage overlimiter.

In other words, if you don't reach the strength of a person who has exceeded the limit, no matter how good your talent and potential are, you don't want to go to the Ancestor Monument of Enlightenment Gold.

Wow!

The black figure attacked Ye Tian.

"Die!"

Ye Tian casually killed the black figure with a spear in his hand and passed the first level in an instant.

Then, he came to the second level.

How is the potential tested?

I saw a statue appear in front of Ye Tian, and an invisible fluctuation swept Ye Tian.

Soon, the information passed through.

Obviously, the Ancestor Holy Mountain had its own way of testing its potential, and as for what the means were, Ye Tian couldn't tell.

Anyway, he came to the third level.
